nodes.name: alter_iceberg_sink_props.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for testing ALTER SINK operations that modify Iceberg sink connector properties.

nodes.name: append_only_with_checkpoint_interval.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for append-only sink mode with a custom checkpoint interval, verifying that data is correctly flushed to Iceberg tables.

nodes.name: case_sensitive_column_upsert.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for upsert mode with case-sensitive column names, ensuring proper column matching in mixed-case schemas.

nodes.name: column_order_validation.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for validating that RisingWave correctly handles schema column ordering when writing to Iceberg tables.

nodes.name: field_id_gap_upsert.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for upsert mode with non-contiguous Iceberg field IDs, testing correct field ID gap handling in schema evolution.

nodes.name: iceberg_connection.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for testing the Iceberg CATALOG CONNECTION object and its use in CREATE SOURCE/SINK statements.

nodes.name: iceberg_predicate_pushdown.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for validating predicate pushdown optimization when reading from Iceberg sources in RisingWave.

nodes.name: iceberg_select_empty_table.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for querying an empty Iceberg table, ensuring correct handling of empty scans.

nodes.name: iceberg_source_all_delete.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for reading Iceberg tables with all-delete files, testing full delete file resolution during batch scans.

nodes.name: iceberg_source_equality_delete.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for reading Iceberg tables containing equality delete files, testing correct application of equality deletes.

nodes.name: iceberg_source_explain_for_delete.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for verifying the EXPLAIN output of queries against Iceberg tables with delete files.

nodes.name: iceberg_source_position_delete.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for reading Iceberg tables with positional delete files, testing correct row filtering.

nodes.name: iceberg_source_streaming.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for reading Iceberg tables as a streaming source, testing incremental snapshot-based ingestion into RisingWave.

nodes.name: no_partition_append_only.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for append-only sink to a non-partitioned Iceberg table, validating end-to-end data correctness.

nodes.name: no_partition_upsert.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for upsert (merge-on-read) sink to a non-partitioned Iceberg table, testing equality delete generation.

nodes.name: partition_append_only.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for append-only sink to a partitioned Iceberg table, testing data routing to correct partition directories.

nodes.name: partition_upsert.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for upsert sink to a partitioned Iceberg table, verifying correct delete and data file generation per partition.

nodes.name: range_partition_append_only.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for append-only sink to a range-partitioned Iceberg table, testing correct handling of range partition transforms.

nodes.name: range_partition_upsert.toml
nodes.summary: Iceberg e2e test case configuration for upsert sink to a range-partitioned Iceberg table, testing equality delete generation with range partition transforms.
